Sub-2-hour half marathon tips that actually work. Run an average pace of 5:40/km or faster, use race day pacers and position yourself just ahead of them, take a couple of gels to maintain energy, don’t train the full distance, and pick a lighter, more responsive shoe. These simple strategies can mak

5 things I say no to as a runner. Run clubs, Ironman training, daily electrolytes, running without headphones, and doing the same race again. This will annoy people, but running looks different for everyone. #running #runtok #runner #marathontraining

As a slower runner I struggle with pace comparison, body image and the feeling of not improving my running. I’m hoping to right some of these by training for a sub 5 hour marathon at the London Marathon 2026. #slowrunner #londonmarathon #londonmarathon2026 #marathontraining #runtok

Things I’d be jealous of you for as a runner. If your easy pace starts with a 5. If you’ve run a World Major marathon. If you can eat whatever you want and stay lean during marathon training. If you live somewhere flat and scenic.If you’ve got a local parkrun five minutes from your house. No bittern

Controversial things I say yes to as a runner. Ordering a huge takeaway after a long run. Signing up for race distances I might not be ready for yet. 5 things I wish existed in running but don’t. From overpriced race photos to poor finisher t shirts and impossible marathon ballots, there are so many parts of the running world that just don’t make sense right now. Chest pain, being violently unwell, and intense post-race blues, things no one really talks about after ultra running. This isn’t to scare anyone off, but to be honest about the physical and mental toll of running 100km and why recovery matters just as much as the training.  #ultrarunning #100km #ru

The 5 easiest ways to improve your 5K time as a slower runner, without overcomplicating training. Speedier shoes for faster turnover, a proper speed run playlist, one longer run to make 5K feel short, simple speed workouts, and keeping easy runs easy so hard sessions actually work.
